svg.text: Kubernetes CSI Volume Lifecycle: PVC → PV → VolumeAttachment → mount
9 swimlanes × 5 phases (Provision → Bind → Attach → Stage → Publish); arrows = CSI gRPC + k8s API watches

dashed = async / status echo / backend hop. Sources: kubernetes v1.36.0 pkg/volume/csi, pkg/kubelet/volumemanager; kubernetes-csi/external-{provisioner,attacher,resizer,snapshotter}; node-driver-registrar.
